zh.lifeSummary: 當Juliana de Leybourne於1303年出生在英國肯特萊波恩時，她的父親Sir Thomas de Leybourne29歲，母親Alice de Tosny19歲。她於大約1320年與John de Hastings, 2nd Lord Hastings結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1367年11月1日在英國肯特坎特布瑞享年64歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特坎特布瑞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Juliana de Leybourne于1303年出生在英国肯特萊波恩时，她的父亲Sir Thomas de Leybourne29岁，母亲Alice de Tosny19岁。她于大约1320年与John de Hastings, 2nd Lord Hastings结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1367年11月1日在英国肯特坎特布瑞享年64岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特坎特布瑞。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Leybourne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Laybourne
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Leyburn in Yorkshire. The placename probably derives from Old English hlēg ‘shelter’ + burna ‘spring, stream’.

nameMeanings.name: Juliana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Julianus ( see Julian ), which was revived in England in the 18th century and has been used occasionally ever since.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Juliana de Leybourne was born in 1303, in Leybourne, Kent, England, her father, Sir Thomas de Leybourne, was 29 and her mother, Alice de Tosny, was 19. She married John de Hastings, 2nd Lord Hastings about 1320. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 1 November 1367, in Canterbury, Kent, England, at the age of 64, and was buried in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Juliana de Leybourne est née en 1303, à Leybourne, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas de Leybourne, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Alice de Tosny, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé John de Hastings, 2nd Lord Hastings environ 1320. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 novembre 1367, à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Juliana de Leybourne 1303 in Leybourne, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas de Leybourne 29 und ihre Mutter Alice de Tosny 19. Sie hat um 1320 John de Hastings, 2nd Lord Hastings geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. November 1367 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Canterbury, Kent, England und wurde in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Juliana de Leybourne è nata il nel 1303 nel Leybourne, Kent, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas de Leybourne, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Alice de Tosny, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato John de Hastings, 2nd Lord Hastings circa 1320. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 1 novembre 1367, nel Canterbury, Kent, England, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolta a Canterbury, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Juliana de Leybourneが1303年にイギリスケントリーボウルンで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas de Leybourneは29歳，母Alice de Tosnyは19歳であった。約1320年にJohn de Hastings, 2nd Lord Hastingsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1367年11月1日にイギリスケントカンテルブリーで64歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントカンテルブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Juliana de Leybourne(이)가 1303년 영국 켄트 리보우른에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas de Leybourne(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Tosny(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1320년 John de Hastings, 2nd Lord Hastings(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1367년 11월 1일 영국 켄트 캉르버이에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 캉르버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Juliana de Leybourne nasceu em 1303, em Leybourne, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas de Leybourne, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Tosny, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Hastings, 2nd Lord Hastings aproximadamente 1320. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de novembro de 1367, em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, com 64 anos, e foi sepultada em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Juliana de Leybourne родилась в 1303 г. в местности либурн, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas de Leybourne было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Tosny, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Hastings, 2nd Lord Hastings около 1320 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 1 ноября 1367 г. в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Juliana de Leybourne nació en 1303, en Leybourne, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas de Leybourne, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Alice de Tosny, tenía 19 años. Se casó con John de Hastings, 2nd Lord Hastings aproximadamente 1320. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 1 de noviembre de 1367, en Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultada en Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
